name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Meet the special guests for tomorrow’s State of the Union
body:
Today, First Lady Melania Trump announced the special guests that will join her at the U.S. Capitol tomorrow night. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=40b600f428&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • February 4, 2019
---
| | |
# Meet the special guests for tomorrow’s State of the Union****

**Today,****President Donald J. Trump and First Lady Melania Trump** announced the special guests who will join them at the U.S. Capitol tomorrow night.

**This year’s guests** come from all different walks of life, and each has an incredible story to tell. Many have overcome exceptional hardship. Some have served our country in the Armed Forces or in law enforcement. Others have endured personal tragedy because of America’s broken immigration system.

**No matter their story** , each guest has something important in common: They represent the very best of America.

**They’re also resilient.** Take Roy James. After working for 26 years at a sawmill in Vicksburg, Mississippi, he was told the facility would close its doors last May. His family had lived in town for generations and wanted to keep it that way. Thankfully, Vicksburg was designated an Opportunity Zone in President Trump’s tax reform law. The plant reopened, and Roy was rehired to oversee the whole facility.

**Or Matthew Charles.** After leaving the Army, Matthew fell into a life of crime. Arrested for selling drugs in 1995, he found God while serving his sentence and became a mentor and GED course instructor for fellow inmates. After more than two decades behind bars, on January 3, he became the first prisoner released as a result of the First Step Act.

[_Meet each of the special guests._](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=5169fb73ed&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|

name: Bobby Jindal
subject: WSJ: The Left’s Idea of Generosity
body:
**The Left’s Idea of Generosity**
_Progressives across the West are eager to spend other people’s money on moral vanity projects._

The Wall Street Journal | Bobby Jindal

|

_A yellow-jacket protester in Paris, Nov. 24, 2018. PHOTO: ASSOCIATED PRESS_
---
Studies consistently show that Republicans give more than Democrats to private charities. But as any liberal will happily tell you, that doesn’t capture the whole picture. The left, they say, is far more generous than the right. It’s just that they don’t express their concern for the disadvantaged via charitable giving. Rather, they raise taxes and spread the wealth via big government.

There’s only one problem: The disadvantaged don’t always want that kind of help. For proof, consider the recent “yellow vest” protests in France. President Emmanuel Macron’s unpopular gas-tax increase—aimed at stopping climate change—will only negligibly reduce global greenhouse emissions. What it will do is empty rural workers’ pocketbooks. Compared with their urban political leaders, the rural French must travel great distances for work without ready access to public transit. Higher taxes take a real bite out of their paychecks. And all so that France’s political leaders can appear virtuous, while accomplishing nothing.

Liberals in the U.S. have also pursued radical environmental agendas that burden average Americans. Higher energy and housing costs—the byproducts of liberal environmental and restrictive building regulations—are an inconvenience for the wealthy, but threaten the American dream for everyone else.

[Read more...](http://wc4.net/t?r=4673&c=16947&l=203&ctl=4AD22:C15079EF2606CA7C9896E0B5ABBDB2B9696548644412C47B&)

* * *

[Unsubscribe](http://wc4.net/u?id=C15079EF2606CA7C9896E0B5ABBDB2B9696548644412C47B)

name: Debbie Wasserman Schultz
subject: Who knows what Trump will say tonight
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress
body:
No matter what he says, our job won't change.
|
---
| | President Trump is set to give his State of the Union speech tonight in primetime. Who knows what he'll say. I'm guessing it will be more of the same -- lies, half-truths, and fear-mongering to drum up his base. But no matter what he says, **our work to counteract his toxic agenda will not change.** [**Before midnight, I need to get 50 supporters to give $5 or more to show we will continue mobilizing against the Trump agenda. Will you be one of them?**](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113cde/622b7b5b/1e857d89/307b73dc/343381896/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dwse190205am?refcode=dwse190205am_m&recurring=true&amount=5") _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | | [$5](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113cde/622b7b5b/1e857d89/307b73df/343381896/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dwse190205am?refcode=dwse190205am_m&amounts=5,10,25,50,100&express_lane=true&amount=5")

Debbie

name: Lara Trump
subject: Did you see Eric’s email?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
Your name could be displayed LIVE. |
---
| | | | | | | | [](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=54bef5f678817ba7b2b2070f212070ccfb32a577ebcfb663c323a612f59c19ec3fef882112d1fe44787eebe3e8690a7e4d34aa1d53475b0d)
---

Friend,

My husband, Eric Trump and President Trump both emailed you about having your name displayed LIVE during the State of the Union Address.

This is an unbelievable opportunity for you to show every single critic in the world, that you publicly support the greatest President ever.

When the President talks to me about our great country, he always says that what makes America so great is **YOU - the hard-working American.**

Don't miss out on this opportunity to have your name cemented in history!

**From:** Eric Trump

Friend,

We're sick of hearing the media say we don't have a voice. Today that ends.

YOU can prove them wrong while the world watches my father's CRITICAL State of the Union Address.

The official Donald J. Trump for President livestream of the speech will display the names of all the patriots who chose to make a contribution for the world to see.

| **[Please make a contribution of $5 IN THE NEXT 3 HOURS to have your name proudly displayed LIVE during the President's State of the Union Address.](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=54bef5f678817ba7f6d7408f2b0e46d2f148e6af48249e207599da782def5370a3a53cc9420bfbb1b0146cf5195fa78dc5f81d58b3bf3d08)** [](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=9b5d858d6fc5ab049d0fcabdbbec6b51312131ac0268331290aa1381cc8c11f7a3131dcf33bcbcb12726537d1df885c2fb27d91abd205b7d) [CONTRIBUTE $20](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=54bef5f678817ba7d5271bb5809b7ffa2daa6f84d665540c03ebb55c3496901da837b4b16973ddd25345d9cdb8cf2a546516e3e1f4477837) [CONTRIBUTE $15](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=54bef5f678817ba7bffeca24a2f74e2b721c6fd4bf2328dbe0700e2d15a66c9077b4004eb2a1e95fa0a51c568f115a12af6f3d5259e83088) [CONTRIBUTE $10](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=54bef5f678817ba759ad6855e56fb6e66d75d8cfef9df87245ec1f92c6ae19ac0f7a01f1bddf8641f8fe6b7b88dddb7a97333857cc8a9f54) [CONTRIBUTE $5](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=54bef5f678817ba7bebb8e75082983a4dba655426cdb5bb59b99a3e3c784f5fb2df0e41ee62adf26d4a9cd864fad8020b38c907849aad6df) [CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=54bef5f678817ba757ff0cf7f2966fce0934b1c8e69fac80679d8733ad442df37f33ac5b3bc9f3172d585d749d77ebd2a31a2ba86202e153) Even if you choose to only give $1, the proof of your support will send shockwaves around the world as they see every American who proudly stands behind our President.

As the President has said so many times before, it's not the size of your gift that matters, but the fact that you stepped up to have a stake in the future of our country.

This is a movement. It's not about just one of us. It's about _ALL OF US_ united behind our shared vision to Make America Great Again!

**_[So before the speech, make your contribution of $5 to have it displayed right under the livestream of the President's State of the Union.](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=54bef5f678817ba7623be49315b1f1d5c431ab6328a669c70b8bedc58f631662aa70d53a0387e6f9f056350154bb656110ea90bd472638b9)_**

Thanks, [](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=54bef5f678817ba76652bb7877fb4118ed93a691de17683535ec205558fe754ddc0992a016fdcde7452b62cabe44a500be572df337745a37)
Eric Trump

[CONTRIBUTE $5](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=54bef5f678817ba7d8d125fda2e5ccbb4b642c0613e5b67907578cb0412477596231a45298ccd149a959ac832f20112f604cd8dd53b6ff95)

Trump Make America Great Again Committee, 138 Conant Street, 2nd Floor, Beverly, MA 01915

We believe this is an important way to reach our grassroots supporters with the most up-to-date information regarding the efforts of the Trump Make America Great Again Committee and President Trump, and we're glad you're on our team. It's because of grassroots supporters like you that we will Make America Great Again, and we appreciate your support. Thank you for all that you do!

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: The Theme of President Trump’s State of the Union: “Choosing Greatness”
body:
In Fox News, former Speaker of the House Newt Gingrich writes... | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=87ceccbb18&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **The Theme of President Trump’s State of the Union: “Choosing Greatness”**

In Fox News, former Speaker of the House Newt Gingrich writes that “there is a certain logic to President Trump emphasizing that Americans should move beyond vicious partisanship and ‘choose greatness’ for their country. This concept of American greatness has deep roots – from the Founding Fathers through Abraham Lincoln to Reverend Martin Luther King, Jr.”

Tonight the President “will be building on an astonishing run of economic growth, job creation, the lowest unemployment for African-Americans and Hispanics and Latinos historically recorded, rising real wages and real progress in trade negotiations.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8933636937&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| In _[USA Today](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=85fcc09b44&e=3ee4985eea)_ , Rep. Matt Gaetz (R-FL) writes that border walls work, and Democrats know it all too well. “The clock is ticking, and Congress must quickly develop comprehensive border security legislation. America is waiting. But first, Democrats must realize something simple — something the American people already understand: We need a wall. House Speaker Nancy Pelosi dismisses a border wall as ‘immoral.’ This claim is brazenly false.”
---
|
---
| “In June, the Trump administration instituted new rules that would allow small businesses and individuals to access health insurance through what the president called ‘association health plans.’ This would permit certain businesses and the self-employed to band together, even across state lines, to provide coverage for members outside of Obamacare’s strict rules,” Jack Hunter writes in the _[Washington Examiner](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8b5d630dfc&e=3ee4985eea)_. Critics incorrectly predicted this plan would fail, Hunter notes. “It turns out association health plans have quickly become a solution to many Americans’ coverage problems, are more affordable than Obamacare, and are helping many get the care they need.”
---
|
---
| “In a historic march to regain control of their country, which was once the most prosperous nation in South America, Venezuelans bravely and peacefully took to the streets in hopes of reclaiming their homeland from the violent tyranny that is choking the country,” Lieutenant Governor of Florida Jeanette Nuñez writes in the _[Miami Herald](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=7c671e6ab0&e=3ee4985eea)_. “In solidarity, President Trump took an important step in recognizing Juan Guaidó, the highest ranking and legitimately elected leader of Venezuela’s National Assembly, as the country’s interim president. Many other nations, including Canada, Brazil, Chile and Colombia, have followed suit.”
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=ef0c55fc38&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=6bc49ac242&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=02cb94d3bd)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

body:
Divisive language. Misinformation. Unrealistic demands. This
is what we can expect from President Trump’s State of the Union
address tonight.

In the midst of ongoing political fights, the American people
deserve a commonsense solution on border security that won’t put
them through the pain of another shutdown.

We’re organizing a Rapid Response of 100 grassroots supporters
before Trump’s address begins tonight. Will you chip in to help
us build resources for our outreach efforts spreading Mike’s
message of standing up to Trump’s disastrous agenda?

Thompson HQ

Mike Thompson is a veteran and a longtime public servant. He
represents California's 5th district in Congress, where he fights

Chip in to help Mike build momentum for his message and move forward on realistic solutions for everyday Americans → ( ) Thanks, Thompson HQ Mike Thompson is a veteran and a longtime public servant. He represents California's 5th district in Congress, where he fights for our healthcare and a clean environment every day. He cannot continue to do his crucial work without the support of people like you. Consider making a donation of any amount now. ( ) | Authorized & Paid For By Mike Thompson For Congress | Mike Thompson for Congress PO Box 10541 Napa CA 94581 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please =.

name: Donald J. Trump
subject: About to take the podium
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
One last chance... |
---
| | | | | | | | [](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=41d5911dcdb0cb1364fee0774b5683c4f21bbc0487ba5fe58aaf7210c66013f277563bb671a3e0ad1711826c56fce0fb371a27f72839fc35)
---

Friend,

I'm about to step to the podium to start my second State of the Union Address in a few minutes.

By the time you get this email, I may be halfway through the most important State of the Union Address in the history of our country. But I wanted to give you one more chance to cement your name in _HISTORY._
| _**Display your name for the whole world to see.**_.
---
|

name: Kirsten
subject: What Trump will say tonight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand 2020 Exploratory Committee
body:
[](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f97693f/2ae112ef/17d833a1/357a441f/1408334410/VEsH/ "https://2020.kirstengillibrand.com/")
[](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f97693f/2ae112ef/17d833a1/357a441f/1408334410/VEsE/ "https://2020.kirstengillibrand.com/")
Peter,
When we come together around courage and compassion, we realize what's best about America. That's never been Trump's message, and I don't think many of us expect a real transformation tonight at the State of the Union.
Know this: There's a much better future than the one he offers. That's why I'm running. With optimism and a fearless determination to help people--not just the wealthy few--we can accomplish _anything_.
So as Trump prepares to outline his self-serving agenda tonight, I want to hear from you. **What are you concerned about under this administration? What kind of future would you like to see going forward? It would mean so much if you 'd take a moment to share your thoughts with me. Here's the link: **[https://act.kirstengillibrand.com/sotu-survey](https://secure.kirstengillibrand. "https://act.kirstengillibrand.com/sotu-survey/nd?firstName=Peter&lastName=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk2686-su-non-abel-nd")****
I'm so grateful to have you on our team as we build this movement together. This is how we build a country that works for _all_ of us. Thank you.
Kirsten
[Contribute](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f97693f/2ae112ef/17d833a1/357a4419/1408334410/VEsC/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoia2ctZW1haWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6Imp0azI2ODYtc3Utbm9uLWFiZWwtbmQiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiNSwyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCIsImUzc2dZV0p5WldOMWNuSnBibWNnZlgwPSI6IiJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kg-email?refcode=jtk2686-su-non-abel-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from the Gillibrand 2020 Exploratory Committee email list, please click here.](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f97693f/2ae112ef/17d833a1/357a4418/1408334410/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://gillibrand.cp.bsd.net/page/unsubscribe/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")
